query: UPDATE users SET role = 'comercial' WHERE name LIKE '%Martha%' OR email LIKE '%martha%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute UPDATE users SET role = 'comercial' WHERE name LIKE '%Martha%' OR email LIKE '%martha%';
